markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on AEO/GEO strategy and review content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AEO/GEO is a high priority.** The team will aggressively test tactics like FAQs, TLDRs, and schema markup to accelerate traffic while the SEO engine matures.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [**AEO builds on SEO.** Foundational SEO (ranking, site architecture, external mentions) is a prerequisite for LLM visibility, as LLMs query search indexes.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [**ChatGPT is the primary target.** With 80%+ of Logic's LLM traffic, all optimization efforts will prioritize ChatGPT's underlying search engine, Bing.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [**Engineering work is required.** Implementing FAQ schema markup in the blog template is a high-priority task for the Logic team.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

## Topics

### Content & Performance Update

  - [**Publishing:** 8 articles are scheduled to publish daily with new workflows. 5 more are in production, all with new FAQ sections.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Runway:** Content runway is \~1 week. Azzam will use the Airtable interface to approve more topics this week.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Query count, impressions, and search visibility are growing.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [LLM visibility (via Scrunch) increased from 34% to 40% in the last week.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Early LLM referral clicks (5–6) have been recorded, signaling positive momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [**Scrunch Access:** Direct client access is not possible. Bailey will export weekly reports. Azzam needs access to analyze competitor queries and inform strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### AEO/GEO Strategy

  - [**Context:** Azzam requested a review of AEO/GEO tactics from LinkedIn thought leaders, including schema markup and Reddit-based keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [**Alignment:** GrowthX confirmed these tactics are valid and align with their own findings.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [**Key Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
      - [**Schema Markup:** Code snippets that help search engines understand content (e.g., FAQ schema).](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [**FAQs & TLDRs:** Summaries and question-answer sections that improve scannability for both users and LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
      - [**Structured Data:** Tables, bullet points, and optimized images make content easier for LLMs to ingest.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [**External Mentions:** "Surround sound SEO" (G2 reviews, Reddit mentions) is critical for building authority and driving LLM referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [**ChatGPT Optimization:** With 80%+ of Logic's LLM traffic coming from ChatGPT, all efforts will prioritize its underlying search engine, Bing.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [**Experimentation:** Logic will serve as a candidate for GrowthX's advanced AEO/GEO experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

### Technical & Engineering Items

  - [**FAQ Schema Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Engineering work is needed to add FAQ schema markup to the blog template.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
      - [**Scope:** A minor effort involving a code snippet and backend form fields.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
      - [**Priority:** Azzam designated this a high-priority task for Logic's roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [**Scrunch Beta Flag:**](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
      - [**Issue:** A Scrunch beta feature flagged a significant deviation between the JavaScript and non-JavaScript versions of the site.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
      - [**Status:** Steve suspects he knows the cause.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Azzam:**](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [Approve content topics via Airtable interface by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [Discuss FAQ schema implementation with Steve to prioritize on the roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Export and share weekly Scrunch performance reports.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
      - [Share AEO/GEO case studies and experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [**Steve:**](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
      - [Investigate the Scrunch beta flag regarding the JavaScript site deviation.](https://fathom.video/share/2jnq_49XqLpFMPHjTw4FzD9Fhc86ZQmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
